description: Accepts natural language expense entries from the user, extracts amount, category, date, and notes. Categorizes expenses automatically (Food, Transport, Shopping, Bills, Entertainment, Health, etc.) and returns structured expense data for storage.

example_response.category: Expense category: Food, Transport, Shopping, Bills, Entertainment, Health, Education, Travel, Subscriptions, or Other
example_response.notes: Additional notes or description of the expense
example_response.confidence: How confident the agent is in the parsing: high, medium, low
